overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban commercial district in Night City. The character moves from a narrow corridor into a bustling pedestrian street lined with neon signs and outdoor cafes, then ascends a staircase to an upper plaza level surrounded by towering glass buildings and holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service corridor between concrete buildings

events.description: exits narrow concrete corridor into open pedestrian street with visible skyline

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the corridor toward the open street and large billboard ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward camera in the middle of the corridor

entered.detail: tall gray concrete walls lining both sides of the narrow corridor
large orange vertical billboard with ALL FOODS advertisement and BUY 2 GET 1 FREE text
purple neon sign for El Guapo business on the left building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow concrete corridor with tall walls on both sides. As the character moves forward, they emerge into a wider pedestrian street. The ALL FOODS billboard becomes visible in the distance, and the El Guapo neon sign appears on the left building. A single pedestrian walks toward the camera in the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian shopping street with outdoor dining

agents.ego_description: walking along the pedestrian street passing outdoor cafe seating and food stalls

notable_agents.action: person sitting at outdoor cafe table under purple umbrella

entered.detail: colorful restaurant facade with FOODSCAPE signage and orange and teal trim
plastic chairs and tables with large purple umbrellas arranged on the sidewalk
small food kiosk with glowing purple neon trim and paper lanterns

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a vibrant pedestrian street lined with commercial establishments. The FOODSCAPE cafe occupies the left side with outdoor seating under purple umbrellas, while a glowing purple food stall stands on the right. Pedestrians walk in the same direction, and the concrete walls of the previous corridor recede behind.

events.description: begins ascending the wide concrete staircase with teal painted walls

agents.ego_description: climbing the staircase while pedestrians descend from the upper level

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange outfit descending the stairs toward camera

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with multiple steps leading upward between buildings
teal painted concrete walls lining both sides of the staircase
orange metal handrails mounted on the teal walls along the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and begins ascending a wide staircase with distinctive teal walls and orange railings. The staircase connects the lower street level to an upper plaza. Several pedestrians descend the stairs in the opposite direction, including one in an orange outfit. The commercial establishments of the previous street level fall behind as the climb progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with planters and advertising

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters open plaza area with large planters

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper plaza, looking around at the surrounding architecture and billboards

entered.detail: large white rectangular planters containing spiky succulent plants arranged across the plaza
storefront with green neon signage reading Dima and Duzz
tall modern building with reflective glass facade and multiple floors
large digital advertisements including one for Chrome and holographic displays on building faces

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the top of the stairs, the scene opens into a spacious elevated plaza with geometric concrete planters housing spiky plants. The character walks past the Dima and Duzz store on the left while massive holographic billboards and a towering glass office building dominate the right side. The area is relatively quiet with only a few scattered pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined concrete corridor into a vibrant commercial district that eventually ascends to a spacious elevated plaza. It begins within narrow walls, moving forward past a lone pedestrian until the space opens into a wide pedestrian street where the El Guapo neon sign and a distant ALL FOODS billboard emerge. As the camera progresses, the concrete walls recede to reveal a bustling thoroughfare lined with the purple umbrellas of the FOODSCAPE cafe and glowing food stalls. The scene then shifts as the character approaches and ascends a wide staircase with teal walls and orange railings, leaving the lower commercial level behind while passing descending pedestrians. Finally, the climb culminates in a quiet upper plaza characterized by geometric concrete planters and the Dima and Duzz store, all set against a backdrop of towering glass office buildings and massive holographic billboards.
